calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281647 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73281647 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281647 --event evt-petition-disposition\nfind data/cases/scotus/73281647 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json\nsed -n '220,520p' data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json\nrg -n \"^(QUESTION|QUESTIONS|INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|TABLE OF CONTENTS|SUMMARY)|division|split|vehicle|waiv|forfeit|interlocut|public necessity|police power|Takings Clause|Slaybaugh|Baker|Lech|Seventh|Ninth\" data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|Segment base rate by salience band|Relist|CVSG|originating circuit|Ninth|2024 Term|2023 Term|2022 Term|paid|Paid\" metrics/statpack.md | head -160\nsed -n '520,1010p' data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '990,1611p' data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.o

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,190p' metrics/statpack.md
sed -n '250,430p' data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt
sed -n '730,1040p' data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt
sed -n '1220,1314p' data/cases/scotus/73281647/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json\njq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\" or .term == 2025))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240\nrg -n 'salience|fee|paid|relist' metrics/statpack.json | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation '145 S. Ct. 11' --limit 8 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Takings Clause\" \"public necessity\" law enforcement property damage",filed_before:"2026-07-18",num_results:10,order_by:"score desc",fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"d",docket_number:"25-1158",court:"scotus",num_results:5,fields:["docket_id","docketNumber","caseName","dateFiled","dateTerminated","absolute_url"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73281647/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z\njq '.terms[] | select(.term == 2025) | {term, paid: (.classes[] | select(.fee_class == \"paid\") | {filings, est_grant_rate, dispositions})}' metrics/statpack.json\ndate -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
